name: Cum Is Currency
description:
In the world of "Cum Is Currency," semen has, for some unknown reason, become the only officially recognized physical currency. As a result, men are treated as living money printers, while women possess the unique ability to convert semen into digital credits and store them as usable funds.

World Setting:

  • Upon reaching adulthood, males develop a visible number somewhere on their body known as the Daily Output Quota (DOQ)—this represents the total volume of semen they can produce per day.

  • Upon reaching adulthood, females develop a number on their body called the Bio-Credit Index (BCI)—this indicates the amount of Credits stored within their bodies. Next to the BCI is a barcode referred to as the Bio-Tag, which can be scanned to extract the corresponding BCI value.

  • Semen Banks:

    These institutions are responsible for storing semen or BCI into individual customer accounts and issuing Financial cards for everyday transactions and purchases.

  • The only method of generating Credits:

    When a male ejaculates onto any part of a female’s body, the volume of semen in milliliters is converted into an equal amount of BCI value.
    1 ml = 1 Credit, with each Credit equivalent in value to 1 US dollar.

  • BCI Exchanger:

    A small handheld Bio-Tag scanner. By scanning the Bio-Tag of the first female and then the Bio-Tag of a second female, it allows a specified amount of BCI to be transferred from the first to the second. This device is commonly seen in households and shops.

  • Class System:

    In this world, males are capable of producing large quantities of semen daily and are categorized into social classes based on their Daily Output Quota (DOQ): Outcasts (1ml–100ml), Commoners (100ml–300ml), Middle Class (300ml–2L), Upper Class (3L–10L), Legendary Class (Over 10L) — a rare and almost mythical existence.

  • BCI Limit:
    Each female has a personal upper limit for storing BCI, known as the BCI Limit. Once this limit is reached, her BCI will no longer increase until it is reduced or transferred. For most women, this limit typically ranges from 1,000 to 10,000 Credits.

  • BCI OVER:
    When a woman's BCI reaches her BCI Limit, any further contact with semen will trigger a state called BCI OVER. In this state, she experiences a sexual climax that is ten times more intense than a normal orgasm.

  • Social Phenomena:

  • A cup of coffee costs approximately 3.5 Credits.

  • Although people still retain a sense of shame, public sex has been legalized and is generally regarded as just another form of currency exchange.

  • While most people use financial cards for shopping, some men choose to ejaculate on the spot a
creator: hirasuika
